SEARCH
Package DAO

Class OrderDAO

java.lang.Object
DAO.OrderDAO
public class OrderDAO extends Object
Data Access Object (DAO) for managing Order entities. Handles all database interactions regarding orders, including creation, retrieval, updates, status changes, and complex reporting queries.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    OrderDAO()

    Counts active APPROVED orders for a specific timestamp.

  • Constructor Details

    • OrderDAO

      public OrderDAO()

  • Method Details

    • getAllOrders

      public List<Order> getAllOrders() throws SQLException
      Retrieves all orders from the database, joined with customer details.
      Returns:
      A list of all orders.
      Throws:
      SQLException - If a database error occurs.

    • getAllOrdersApproved

      public List<Order> getAllOrdersApproved(int subscriberCode) throws SQLException
      Retrieves all APPROVED orders for a specific subscriber code.
      Parameters:
      subscriberCode - The subscriber's unique code.
      Returns:
      List of approved orders for that subscriber.
      Throws:
      SQLException - If a database error occurs.

    • getActiveOrderSizes2

      public List<Integer> getActiveOrderSizes2(Date requestedDate) throws SQLException
      Retrieves the size (number of guests) of active orders that overlap with a 2-hour window starting from the requested date.
      Parameters:
      requestedDate - The start time to check.
      Returns:
      List of integers representing guest counts of conflicting orders.
      Throws:
      SQLException - If a database error occurs.

    • getOrdersForReminder

      public List<Order> getOrdersForReminder(int minutesAhead) throws SQLException
      Retrieves orders that are due for a reminder. Looks for orders occurring within a specific time window (+/- 2 minutes of the target time).
      Parameters:
      minutesAhead - How many minutes ahead the reminder should be sent (e.g., 120 for 2 hours).
      Returns:
      List of orders requiring reminders.
      Throws:
      SQLException - If a database error occurs.

    • markAsReminded

      public boolean markAsReminded(int orderNumber) throws SQLException
      Marks an order as having its reminder sent.
      Parameters:
      orderNumber - The order ID.
      Returns:
      true if update was successful.
      Throws:
      SQLException - If a database error occurs.

    • getAllOrdersWithCustomers

      public List<Map<String,Object>> getAllOrdersWithCustomers()
      Retrieves all orders joined with customer data as a Map. Useful for constructing data tables in the UI.
      Returns:
      List of Maps containing order and customer data.

    • getOrdersByCustomerId

      public List<Order> getOrdersByCustomerId(int customerId) throws SQLException
      Retrieves all orders for a specific customer ID.
      Parameters:
      customerId - The customer ID.
      Returns:
      List of orders.
      Throws:
      SQLException - If a database error occurs.

    • getOrderInTimeWindow

      public Order getOrderInTimeWindow(int customerId, Date checkDate) throws SQLException
      Checks if a customer already has an approved order within a 2-hour window of the checkDate.
      Parameters:
      customerId - The customer ID.
      checkDate - The date to check around.
      Returns:
      The existing Order if found, or null.
      Throws:
      SQLException - If a database error occurs.

    • countConflictingOrders

      public int countConflictingOrders(Date requestedDate, int guests) throws SQLException
      Counts conflicting orders for table availability check. Checks for approved or seated orders that overlap with the requested 2-hour window.
      Parameters:
      requestedDate - The requested reservation time.
      guests - The number of guests (to match table capacity).
      Returns:
      Count of conflicting orders.
      Throws:
      SQLException - If a database error occurs.

    • getOrder

      public Order getOrder(int id) throws SQLException
      Retrieves an order by its unique order number.
      Parameters:
      id - The order ID.
      Returns:
      The Order object.
      Throws:
      SQLException - If a database error occurs.

    • createOrder

      public boolean createOrder(Order o) throws SQLException
      Inserts a new order into the database.
      Parameters:
      o - The Order object to create.
      Returns:
      true if successful.
      Throws:
      SQLException - If a database error occurs.

    • updateOrder

      public boolean updateOrder(Order o) throws SQLException
      Updates all fields of an existing order.
      Parameters:
      o - The Order object with updated values.
      Returns:
      true if successful.
      Throws:
      SQLException - If a database error occurs.

    • deleteOrder

      public boolean deleteOrder(int id) throws SQLException
      Deletes an order from the database.
      Parameters:
      id - The order ID.
      Returns:
      true if successful.
      Throws:
      SQLException - If a database error occurs.

    • getApprovedOrdersByGuestCount

      public List<Order> getApprovedOrdersByGuestCount(int guests) throws SQLException
      Retrieves APPROVED orders for a specific number of guests.
      Parameters:
      guests - The number of guests.
      Returns:
      List of matching orders.
      Throws:
      SQLException - If a database error occurs.

    • getOrderByConfirmationCode

      public Order getOrderByConfirmationCode(int code) throws SQLException
      Fetches an APPROVED order by confirmation code.
      Parameters:
      code - The confirmation code.
      Returns:
      The Order object if found.
      Throws:
      SQLException - If a database error occurs.

    • getOrderByConfirmationCodePending

      public Order getOrderByConfirmationCodePending(int confirmationCode) throws SQLException
      Fetches a PENDING order by confirmation code.
      Parameters:
      confirmationCode - The confirmation code.
      Returns:
      The Order object if found.
      Throws:
      SQLException - If a database error occurs.

    • getOrderByConfirmationCodeWithStatusNull

      public Order getOrderByConfirmationCodeWithStatusNull(int code) throws SQLException
      Fetches an order by confirmation code that is either PENDING or APPROVED. Used for waiting list checks.
      Parameters:
      code - The confirmation code.
      Returns:
      The Order object if found.
      Throws:
      SQLException - If a database error occurs.

    • getOrderByConfirmationCodeApproved

      public Order getOrderByConfirmationCodeApproved(int code, Integer customerId) throws SQLException
      Checks if there is an approved order ready for seating (within 15 minutes).
      Parameters:
      code - Confirmation code.
      customerId - Customer ID (optional, can be null).
      Returns:
      The Order if found and valid.
      Throws:
      SQLException - If a database error occurs.

    • getOrderByConfirmationCodeSeated

      public Order getOrderByConfirmationCodeSeated(int code, Integer customerId) throws SQLException
      Checks if there is a SEATED order for a customer or code.
      Parameters:
      code - Confirmation code.
      customerId - Customer ID.
      Returns:
      The Order if found.
      Throws:
      SQLException - If a database error occurs.

    • updateOrderCheckOut

      public boolean updateOrderCheckOut(int orderId, double totalPrice, Order.OrderStatus status) throws SQLException
      Updates order status to PAID and sets leaving time.
      Parameters:
      orderId - Order ID.
      totalPrice - Final price.
      status - New status (PAID).
      Returns:
      true if successful.
      Throws:
      SQLException - If a database error occurs.

    • updateOrderSeating

      public boolean updateOrderSeating(int orderId, int tableNum, Order.OrderStatus status) throws SQLException
      Updates order status to SEATED, assigns a table, and sets arrival time.
      Parameters:
      orderId - Order ID.
      tableNum - Assigned table number.
      status - New status (SEATED).
      Returns:
      true if successful.
      Throws:
      SQLException - If a database error occurs.

    • updateOrderStatus

      public boolean updateOrderStatus(int orderNumber, Order.OrderStatus status) throws SQLException
      Updates the status of a specific order.
      Parameters:
      orderNumber - The order ID.
      status - The new status.
      Returns:
      true if successful.
      Throws:
      SQLException - If a database error occurs.

    • updateOrderStatusByConformationCode

      public boolean updateOrderStatusByConformationCode(int confirmation_code, Order.OrderStatus status) throws SQLException
      Updates order status based on confirmation code.
      Parameters:
      confirmation_code - The confirmation code.
      status - The new status.
      Returns:
      true if successful.
      Throws:
      SQLException - If a database error occurs.

    • getActiveOrdersInTimeRange

      public List<Integer> getActiveOrdersInTimeRange(Date requestedDate) throws SQLException
      Retrieves guest counts for active orders within 2 hours of the requested date.
      Parameters:
      requestedDate - The date to check.
      Returns:
      List of guest counts.
      Throws:
      SQLException - If a database error occurs.

    • countActiveOrdersInTimeRange

      public int countActiveOrdersInTimeRange(Date requestedDate, int minGuestsThreshold) throws SQLException
      Counts active orders (APPROVED/SEATED) that overlap with the requested time.
      Parameters:
      requestedDate - Date to check.
      minGuestsThreshold - Filter by guest count.
      Returns:
      Count of orders.
      Throws:
      SQLException - If a database error occurs.

    • countDisActiveOrdersInTimeRange

      public int countDisActiveOrdersInTimeRange(Date requestedDate, int minGuestsThreshold) throws SQLException
      Counts dis-active orders (CANCELLED/PAID) that overlap with the requested time.
      Parameters:
      requestedDate - Date to check.
      minGuestsThreshold - Filter by guest count.
      Returns:
      Count of orders.
      Throws:
      SQLException - If a database error occurs.

    • countCurrentlySeatedOrders

      public int countCurrentlySeatedOrders(int guests) throws SQLException
      Counts currently SEATED orders with at least the specified guest count.
      Parameters:
      guests - Minimum guests.
      Returns:
      Count of orders.
      Throws:
      SQLException - If a database error occurs.

    • countApprovedOrdersInRange

      public int countApprovedOrdersInRange(Date start, Date end, int guests) throws SQLException
      Counts APPROVED orders within a specific date range.
      Parameters:
      start - Start date.
      end - End date.
      guests - Minimum guests.
      Returns:
      Count of orders.
      Throws:
      SQLException - If a database error occurs.

    • countActiveOrders

      public int countActiveOrders(Date timestamp, int guests)
      Counts active APPROVED orders for a specific timestamp.
      Parameters:
      timestamp - Exact time to check.
      guests - Minimum guests.
      Returns:
      Count of orders.

    • getOrdersByStatus

      public List<Order> getOrdersByStatus(Order.OrderStatus status) throws SQLException
      Retrieves all orders matching a specific status.
      Parameters:
      status - The OrderStatus to filter by.
      Returns:
      List of matching orders.
      Throws:
      SQLException - If a database error occurs.

    • mapResultSetToOrder

      private Order mapResultSetToOrder(ResultSet rs) throws SQLException
      Helper method to map a ResultSet row to an Order object.
      Parameters:
      rs - The ResultSet positioned at the current row.
      Returns:
      The mapped Order object.
      Throws:
      SQLException - If a database error occurs.

    • getOrderByContact

      public Order getOrderByContact(String contactDetail) throws SQLException
      Retrieves an order by customer contact details (email or phone). Looks for recent APPROVED orders (last 15 minutes window).
      Parameters:
      contactDetail - Email or phone number.
      Returns:
      The matching Order or null.
      Throws:
      SQLException - If a database error occurs.

    • getFinishedOrdersByMonth

      public List<Order> getFinishedOrdersByMonth(int month, int year) throws SQLException
      Retrieves finished orders (PAID or CANCELLED) for a specific month/year. Used for generating management reports.
      Parameters:
      month - The month to filter.
      year - The year to filter.
      Returns:
      List of finished orders.
      Throws:
      SQLException - If a database error occurs.

    • getActiveOrderSizes

      public List<Integer> getActiveOrderSizes(Date requestedDate) throws SQLException
      Retrieves sizes of active orders around the requested date (2 hour window).
      Parameters:
      requestedDate - The date to check.
      Returns:
      List of guest counts.
      Throws:
      SQLException - If a database error occurs.
